# Unik Biotech Research

> Unik Biotech Research is an ISO 9001:2008 certified manufacturer of advanced agricultural inputs, organic fertilizers, biostimulants, and micronutrient fertilizers based in Nashik, Maharashtra, India. Established in 2005.

## Company Overview

Unik Biotech Research provides scientifically advanced, high-quality agricultural inputs that are sustainable and affordable. The company focuses on improving crop health, yield, and soil fertility for farmers across India.

- **Founded**: 2005
- **Location**: B-178, S.S. Co-Op. Ind. Estate, Pimpalgaon (B), Tal. Niphad, Dist. Nashik - 422 209, Maharashtra, India
- **CEO**: Vilas R. Damre
- **Certification**: ISO 9001:2008
- **Contact**: Sales@unikbiotechresearch.com | +91-7666272741
- **Website**: https://unikbiotechresearch.com

## Product Categories

### Micronutrient Fertilizers
Chelated micronutrient products including EXTRA (amino acid chelated), UNIMIX (complete mix), CALCHEL (calcium EDTA), CHILMAG (magnesium), UNIBORO ZINC, UNICALBOR, FERROUS EDDHA, and UNISULF.

### Amino Acids & Biostimulants
High-performance growth enhancers including AMINORICH (80% amino acids, 18 types), EXCESS (12-type biostimulant), PROMINO S.L. (L-based amino acids), JEMS PLUS, CROP SURE, UNISEARICH (Ascophyllum seaweed extract), ROYAL PLUS, and LONGER-E.

### Crop Protection
Herbal and organic crop protection products including SUCCESS (thrips & mites), REMEDY (larvae control), UNILEXIN (downy mildew), FAST-40, UNIBACT (bactericide), KUNDAL (herbal biocide), ANTINEMATODE, and REMOK.

### Soil Conditioners
Soil health improvers including AGROMIC RICH (potassium humate), AGROMIC (humic + fulvic acid), AGROMIC-G (granule enricher), BROUN GOLD (80% fulvic acid), and UNISIL (mineral silicon).

### Bio Fertilizers
Biological fertilizers including RHYZOMAX (root stimulant), RHIZOSPROUT (seed enhancer), AZOTOBACTOR (nitrogen-fixing), MYCORRHIZA (root fungi), and P.S.B. (phosphate solubilizing bacteria).

### Spreaders & Stickers
Application enhancers including SAVE-MORE (non-ionic spreader) and ALL ROUND (silicone spreader).

## Pages

- [Home](https://unikbiotechresearch.com/): Main landing page with company overview, featured products, and contact info
- [About](https://unikbiotechresearch.com/about): Company history, mission, vision, timeline, certifications, and core values
- [Products](https://unikbiotechresearch.com/products): Full product catalog with filtering by category
- [Contact](https://unikbiotechresearch.com/contact): Contact form, address, phone, email, WhatsApp, and Google Maps location
- [Dealer Locator](https://unikbiotechresearch.com/dealer-locator): Find dealers across Maharashtra or apply to become a dealer

## Key Facts

- Over 100+ products in the portfolio
- Serves farmers across Maharashtra and India
- Products are environment-friendly and non-toxic
- R&D department develops new products based on market and farmer demands
- Supports crops including grapes, pomegranate, banana, cotton, soybean, tomato, chili, onion, sugarcane, and vegetables
- Available in English, Hindi (हिंदी), and Marathi (मराठी)
